info.title: Next Wiki API
info.description: OpenAPI specification for the Next Wiki REST API.

category.description: Category-level policy target; null/omitted for provider default.

toolName.description: Tool-specific policy target; null for category/provider default.

enabled.description: Whether the tool/category can be used.

reviewPolicy.description: New review policy. Cannot be set less restrictive than the system minimum.

AiToolPolicyPatchInput.description: Update Admin-managed policy for a provider, category, or tool.

category.description: Category-level target, or null for provider/tool scope.

toolName.description: Tool-specific target, or null for category/provider scope.

enabled.description: Whether the tool/category can be used.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the policy was last updated (ISO 8601).

AiToolPolicyResource.description: An effective Admin tool policy resource.

AiToolProposalApplyOutput.description: Result of applying an approved tool change proposal.

AiToolProposalDecisionBody.description: Approve or reject a tool change proposal.

hasConflict.description: Whether any item no longer matches its proposal base.

items.description: Proposal summaries for the current result window.

AiToolProposalsListOutput.description: Admin list of tool change proposals.

enabled.description: Whether the provider is enabled by Admin policy.

activationStatus.description: Whether the provider can currently be activated.

requiredScope.description: Permission/action needed to call the tool.

enabled.description: Whether the tool is currently enabled.

resultRetention.description: How much of a result may be retained in Conversation records.

effectiveReview.description: Effective review disposition after server policy resolution.

tools.description: Visible tools and their effective policies.

AiToolsListOutput.description: Admin listing of tool providers, tools, and effective policies.

name.description: Human-readable name for the API key.

scopes.description: Permission scopes granted to the key.

keyPrefix.description: Non-secret prefix of the key, shown for identification.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the key was created.

revokedAt.description: Timestamp when the key was revoked, or null if still active.

lastUsedAt.description: Timestamp when the key was last used, or null if never used.

keySecret.description: Full secret key value. Shown only once, at creation time.

ApiKeyCreated.description: API key creation response, including the one-time secret value.

name.description: Human-readable name for the API key.

scopes.description: Permission scopes granted to the key.

keyPrefix.description: Non-secret prefix of the key, shown for identification.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the key was created.

revokedAt.description: Timestamp when the key was revoked, or null if still active.

lastUsedAt.description: Timestamp when the key was last used, or null if never used.

keyId.description: API key identifier used for the request, or null when not applicable.

keyName.description: API key name used for the request, or null when not applicable.

userId.description: Identifier of the user tied to the request, or null when not applicable.

userEmail.description: Email of the user tied to the request, or null when not applicable.

errorMessage.description: Error message, or null when the request succeeded.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the entry was recorded.

entries.description: Audit entries for the current result window.

total.description: Total number of matching audit entries.

backendId.description: Identifier of a saved backend to check.

type.description: Backend type to check, when checking an ad-hoc configuration.

config.description: Ad-hoc backend configuration to check, when not checking a saved backend.

secret.description: Secret for the ad-hoc configuration, if required.

BackendCheckInput.description: Ephemeral storage backend connection check. Provide either a saved backendId or an ad-hoc type/config pair.

detail.description: Additional detail, typically present on failure.

BackendCheckResult.description: Result of a storage backend connection check.

ChangeEmailInput.description: Change the current user email address.

currentPassword.description: Current password, required to authorize the change.

backendId.description: Identifier of the backend being cleaned up.

totalItems.description: Total number of items to delete.

deletedItems.description: Number of items deleted so far.

errorMessage.description: Error message, or null if none.

startedAt.description: Timestamp when the cleanup job started, or null if not yet started.

finishedAt.description: Timestamp when the cleanup job finished, or null if still running.

backendId.description: Identifier of the backend to delete migrated-away content from.

confirm.description: Must be true to confirm the destructive cleanup.

CleanupStartInput.description: Start a storage backend cleanup job.

sourceKey.description: Stable registered Content Data Source key.

enabled.description: Whether the source currently captures content.

available.description: Whether the source can operate in the current writing mode.

unavailableReason.description: Reason the source is unavailable, or null when available.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the source setting was last updated (ISO 8601).

ContentDataSourceItem.description: A registered Content > Data Source and its current settings.

enabled.description: Whether the source should capture content going forward.

name.description: Human-readable name for the API key.

scopes.description: Permission scopes granted to the key. At least one is required; scopes must be unique.

queued.description: Whether a Git export run was queued.

GitExportRunResult.description: Result of manually triggering a Git export run.

remoteUrl.description: Git remote URL (HTTPS or SSH, without embedded credentials).

branch.description: Git branch to push exports to.

publicKey.description: SSH public key, when using SSH authentication.

fingerprint.description: SSH key fingerprint, when using SSH authentication.

autoSyncOnPublish.description: Whether to export automatically when a page is published. Defaults to true.

scheduledSyncEnabled.description: Whether to export on a schedule. Defaults to false.

scheduledSyncIntervalMinutes.description: Interval in minutes between scheduled exports (5-1440). Defaults to 60.

secret.description: Git HTTPS access token. Write-only; never echoed back.

GitExportUpsert.description: Create or update the Git export backend configuration.

GitSshKeyResult.description: Generated Git export SSH key pair (public half).

HybridPageSearchInput.description: Header hybrid search request: an idempotent query snapshot or a behavior event.

searchRecordId.description: Idempotency key of the search attempt this snapshot belongs to.

semanticState.description: Feature-013 compatibility mirror of the semantic capability; semantic timed_out maps to failed.

engineStates.description: Every capability in the attempt snapshot with its safe lifecycle state. Poll while any state is pending.

items.description: Latest fused snapshot of readable results, de-duplicated by page id.

HybridPageSearchResponse.description: Progressive Header hybrid search snapshot. Every response is a full latest snapshot, not a delta.

eventId.description: Client-generated idempotency key for this behavior event.

searchRecordId.description: Search attempt the behavior belongs to.

searchSessionId.description: Overlay session that owns the search attempt.

action.description: Terminal search behavior: a result was opened, or search was abandoned.

pageId.description: Opened page id; required for result_open and forbidden for escape.

HybridSearchBehaviorInput.description: Record a terminal search behavior for an owned search attempt.

capability.description: Stable product capability identifier; never a database extension or vendor name.

state.description: Safe lifecycle state for this capability within the attempt. No diagnostic detail is exposed.

resultCount.description: Readable result count contributed by this capability after permission filtering.

HybridSearchEngineState.description: Per-capability lifecycle state for one search attempt.

searchRecordId.description: Client-generated idempotency key for one search attempt; retries reuse it.

searchSessionId.description: Client-generated overlay session identifier owning this attempt.

limit.description: Maximum number of fused results to return (1-20). Defaults to 20.

space.description: Space slug to search within. Defaults to the default wiki space.

HybridSearchQueryInput.description: Run or resume one idempotent Header hybrid search attempt.

excerpt.description: Safe excerpt centered on matched content, or null when excerpts are disabled or absent.

score.description: Fused rank score. Not comparable to legacy GET search scores.

relevanceScore.description: Compatibility display value; not the cross-engine ordering algorithm.

matchSources.description: Conceptual feature-013 match sources retained for existing clients.

engineSources.description: Stable capability provenance. Absent only for old stored/compatibility responses.

HybridSearchResult.description: One de-duplicated, permission-filtered hybrid search result.

mustResetPassword.description: Whether the user must set a new password before continuing.

displayName.description: Current user display name, or null when not set.

MigrationList.description: List of content storage migration jobs.

targetBackendId.description: Identifier of the backend to migrate content into.

confirmOverwrite.description: Must be true to proceed when the target backend already has content.

abortRequested.description: Whether an abort has been requested for this migration.

totalItems.description: Total number of items to migrate.

copiedItems.description: Number of items copied so far.

verifiedItems.description: Number of items verified so far.

errorMessage.description: Error message, or null if none.

startedAt.description: Timestamp when the migration started, or null if not yet started.

finishedAt.description: Timestamp when the migration finished, or null if still running.

theme.description: Preferred theme, or null when using the default.

locale.description: Preferred locale, or null when using the default.

contentType.description: MIME type of the stored asset.

sizeBytes.description: Size of the asset in bytes.

url.description: URL to fetch the asset content.

markdown.description: Ready-to-paste Markdown image snippet referencing this asset.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the asset was created (ISO 8601).

contentType.description: MIME type of the uploaded asset.

sizeBytes.description: Size of the uploaded asset in bytes.

url.description: URL to fetch the uploaded asset content.

markdown.description: Ready-to-paste Markdown image snippet referencing the uploaded asset.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the asset was created (ISO 8601).

id.description: Author user identifier, or null when the author is not disclosed.

displayName.description: Author display name, or null when not available.

PublicAuthor.description: Public author identity visible to the caller.

pageId.description: Identifier of the page containing the link.

path.description: Canonical path of the page containing the link.

title.description: Title of the page containing the link.

linkText.description: Link text used in the Markdown link.

PublicBacklink.description: A single backlink to a target page.

items.description: Pages visible to the caller that link to the target page.

path.description: Canonical path of the created page.

revisionId.description: Identifier of the initial draft revision.

PublicBatchCreateResult.description: Result of a batch page creation request.

pageId.description: Identifier of the page this result refers to.

revisionId.description: Identifier of the newly created revision, present on a successful non-dry-run update.

preview.description: Predicted new state, present on a dry_run=true request.

code.description: Public API error code for this item.

PublicBatchItemResult.description: Per-item outcome of a batch operation.

targetStatus.description: Only present (as "deleted") when the target is a soft-deleted page visible to a caller with read_draft or admin access.

PublicDanglingLink.description: A link whose target is unknown or unreadable to the caller.

title.description: Human-readable title for the draft revision.

contentSource.description: Markdown source of the draft revision.

baseRevisionId.description: Revision the draft is based on, for conflict detection. Omit to base on the latest revision.

baseContentHash.description: Expected content hash of the base revision, used for optimistic concurrency control.

metadata.description: Optional structured metadata override. When present, metadata is stored on the revision without requiring equivalent Markdown frontmatter.

writeMetadataToFrontmatter.description: Per-page preference: whether supported metadata is also embedded as a frontmatter block. Omitted by API/AI writers, in which case it is derived from the submitted content.

PublicDraftCreateInput.description: Create a draft revision for an existing public page.

PublicExternalLink.description: An external (https://) Markdown link, not subject to the read-permission model.

PublicLinkSource.description: How the link was discovered: a Markdown link, an Obsidian-style [[wikilink]], or a frontmatter related_pages entry.

node.description: Root page identifier to traverse from.

direction.description: Which edges to follow. Defaults to out.

root.description: The root page the traversal started from.

tiers.description: tiers[0] is the root (single-element array); tiers[1..depth] are each successive hop. A page appears at most once per tier.

viaLinkSource.description: How this page was reached from its parent tier; "backlink" only appears for direction=in|both.

PublicNeighborNode.description: A single node in a neighborhood tier.

targetPath.description: Canonical path of the linked page.

targetStatus.description: Lifecycle state of the linked page.

PublicOutboundLink.description: An outbound link that resolves to a page the caller can read.

pageId.description: Identifier of the page whose outbound links are returned.

links.description: Links that resolve to a page the caller can read.

dangling.description: Links whose target is unknown or unreadable.

PublicOutboundLinksResponse.description: Outbound link graph for a single page.

pageIds.description: Page identifiers to soft-delete (1-50). Not transactional across items.

dryRun.description: Present and true when the request was made with ?dry_run=true.

PublicPageBatchDeleteResult.description: Result of a batch page delete request.

items.description: Items to update (1-50). Not transactional across items.

pageId.description: Identifier of the page to update.

frontmatter.description: Partial frontmatter patch: keys present are written, null deletes the key, absent keys are preserved.

baseRevisionId.description: Expected current latest revision id, used for optimistic concurrency control.

dryRun.description: Present and true when the request was made with ?dry_run=true.

PublicPageBatchUpdateResult.description: Result of a batch page update request.

locale.description: Locale of the page content (e.g. "en"). Defaults to the workspace default.

contentSource.description: Markdown source of the initial page revision. Optional; defaults to an empty draft.

space.description: Target space slug. Raw entries require "raw" and an inputKind.

nature.description: Explicit creation-time classification; defaults from the actor (human=original, machine=generated).

inputKind.description: Required for raw entries; stored as the OKF frontmatter type.

source.description: Immutable source metadata for a raw entry.

contentType.description: MIME type of a raw entry body (RFC 2046). Required when the body is not markdown; defaults to text/markdown.

originalBytes.description: Optional base64 raw payload (PDF, HTML, JSON, image, log) stored via content_assets; its sha256 is recorded on the revision.

categoryId.description: Raw taxonomy category id. Required when space=raw unless an admin default is configured; immutable after creation.

kind.description: Page kind. Use link only for an Admin-managed wiki softlink.

linkTargetPageId.description: Required when kind is link. The target must be a live generated-space native page.

include.description: Comma-separated relations to include in the returned page resource: latestRevision, publishedRevision.

PublicPageIncludeQuery.description: Optional ?include= query parameter for endpoints returning a single PublicPageResource.

PublicPageIncludeValue.description: Optional page relation that can be requested via ?include=.

status.description: Filter pages by lifecycle state. Defaults to published.

q.description: Optional free-text query to filter pages by path or title.

path.description: Exact canonical path to look up a single page. When provided, returns at most one matching page and ignores other filters.

pathPrefix.description: Directory prefix to list all pages under a subtree (e.g. "docs" matches "docs/a", "docs/b", "docs"). Cannot be combined with path.

space.description: Space slug to list pages from. Defaults to the default wiki space.

filterType.description: SDK-friendly alias for filter[type]. Filters to pages whose frontmatter type matches this value.

filter[type].description: Filter to pages whose frontmatter type matches this value.

filterInputKind.description: Raw-only: filter raw entries by their captured inputKind. Independent from filterType (the OKF/frontmatter type).

filterCategoryId.description: Raw-only: filter raw entries by their raw_categories taxonomy id. Independent from filterType.

limit.description: Maximum number of pages to return per request (1-100). Defaults to 20.

cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned by a previous response.

order.description: Sort order: alphabetical by path, or most recently updated first. Defaults to path.

include.description: Comma-separated relations to include: latestRevision, publishedRevision. Omitted by default; fetch a specific revision via GET /pages/{id}/revisions/{version} instead.

createdStart.description: Include only pages created at or after this ISO 8601 timestamp.

createdEnd.description: Include only pages created at or before this ISO 8601 timestamp.

filter[tag].description: Filter to pages whose structured tags include any of these values (repeat the param for multiple, OR-combined).

filter[status].description: Filter to pages whose frontmatter status matches any of these values (repeat the param for multiple, OR-combined).

filter[owner].description: Filter to pages whose frontmatter owner matches any of these values (repeat the param for multiple, OR-combined).

filter[has_frontmatter].description: Filter to pages with (true) or without (false) any parsed frontmatter.

items.description: Page resources for the current result window.

nextCursor.description: Cursor for the next page of results, or null when there are no more.

baseRevisionId.description: Latest revision id the patch was based on.

PublicPageMetadataInput.description: Additive patch for the supported page metadata fields.

PublicPagePath.description: Canonical wiki page path. Use lowercase slash-separated path segments.

baseRevisionId.description: Expected current revision id, used for optimistic concurrency control.

linkTargetPageId.description: New live generated target for an existing link page.

PublicPagePropertiesInput.description: Update page properties. Provide at least one of path, title, or linkTargetPageId.

spaceSlug.description: Slug of the wiki space the page belongs to.

kind.description: Page kind: a native content page or a softlink page rendering a generated target.

pageId.description: Target page identifier of a softlink page.

linkTarget.description: Resolved softlink target, projected only to Admin callers. Null for native pages and omitted for other callers.

actorKind.description: Whether the page was created through a session (human) or an API key/pipeline (machine).

nature.description: Creation-time classification: original human input or generated content.

humanModified.description: Whether any revision of the page was written by a human actor.

visibility.description: Page visibility: public within its space rules, or restricted to administrators.

rawCategorySystemKey.description: Built-in raw category key (e.g. 'conversation') for a raw page filed under a system category; null/omitted otherwise.

conversationChannel.description: Capture channel for a Conversation raw page (025); null/omitted for non-conversation pages and legacy captures that predate the field.

contentSource.description: Markdown source of the current revision. Omitted from list/search results; present on single-page reads and writes.

frontmatter.description: Parsed YAML frontmatter from the leading --- block of the Markdown source, or null if absent/malformed.

writeMetadataToFrontmatter.description: Per-page authoring preference: whether supported metadata is also embedded as a frontmatter block in the Markdown body.

date.description: Calendar date from supported frontmatter, or null when absent.

summary.description: Author-written summary from supported frontmatter, or null when absent.

metadata.description: Typed metadata for the revision currently visible to the caller.

status.description: Page lifecycle state: an unpublished draft, a published page, or a soft-deleted page.

latestRevision.description: Most recent revision of any status, or null if none exists. Omitted unless requested via ?include=latestRevision.

publishedRevision.description: Most recent published revision, or null if never published. Omitted unless requested via ?include=publishedRevision.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the page was created (ISO 8601).

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the page was last updated (ISO 8601).

self.description: Canonical API URL of this page resource. Also the target for PATCH updates.

byPath.description: API URL to look up this page by its canonical path (GET /v1/pages?path=...).

revisions.description: API URL listing this page revisions.

drafts.description: API URL for creating draft revisions of this page.

links.description: Related API resource URLs for this page.

scope.description: Restrict matching to a field, or search across all fields. Defaults to all.

status.description: Filter results by page lifecycle state. Defaults to published.

pathPrefix.description: Directory prefix to restrict matching to pages under a subtree (e.g. "docs" matches "docs/a", "docs/b").

space.description: Space slug to search within. Defaults to the default wiki space.

filter[type].description: Filter to pages whose frontmatter type matches this value.

filterInputKind.description: Raw-only: filter raw entries by inputKind, independent from filterType.

filterCategoryId.description: Raw-only: filter raw entries by raw_categories taxonomy id, independent from filterType.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return per request (1-100). Defaults to 20.

cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned by a previous response.

include.description: Comma-separated relations to include on each result page: latestRevision, publishedRevision.

excerptLength.description: Approximate number of characters of context to return around the matched keyword in excerpt (20-500). Defaults to 100.

createdStart.description: Only include pages created at or after this ISO 8601 timestamp.

createdEnd.description: Only include pages created at or before this ISO 8601 timestamp.

updatedStart.description: Only include pages last updated at or after this ISO 8601 timestamp.

updatedEnd.description: Only include pages last updated at or before this ISO 8601 timestamp.

filter[tag].description: Filter to pages whose structured tags include any of these values (repeat the param for multiple, OR-combined).

filter[status].description: Filter to pages whose frontmatter status matches any of these values (repeat the param for multiple, OR-combined).

filter[owner].description: Filter to pages whose frontmatter owner matches any of these values (repeat the param for multiple, OR-combined).

filter[has_frontmatter].description: Filter to pages with (true) or without (false) any parsed frontmatter.

items.description: Search results for the current result window.

nextCursor.description: Cursor for the next page of results, or null when there are no more.

tags.description: The complete replacement tag set for the page.

PublicPageTagsInput.description: Replace a page's tags; the change is published immediately.

path.description: Full canonical path of this node (may be empty for the root).

segment.description: Last slash-separated segment of the path.

title.description: Page title when a page exists at this path, otherwise null.

pageId.description: Page id when a page exists at this path, otherwise null.

status.description: Page status when a page exists, otherwise null.

kind.description: Page kind when a page exists at this node: native or a softlink page.

pageId.description: Target page identifier of a softlink page.

linkTarget.description: Resolved softlink target, projected only to Admin callers.

children.description: Child nodes ordered by path segment.

PublicPageTreeNode.description: A single node in the public wiki page directory tree.

status.description: Filter pages by lifecycle state. Defaults to published.

pathPrefix.description: Directory prefix to scope the tree to a subtree (e.g. "docs" returns only the docs/ branch).

space.description: Space slug to build the tree from. Defaults to the default wiki space.

filter[type].description: Filter to pages whose frontmatter type matches this value.

root.description: Root node of the directory tree. When pathPrefix is set, this is the prefix node.

pageCount.description: Total number of visible pages represented in the tree.

PublicPageTreeResponse.description: Hierarchical directory structure of public wiki pages.

expectedRevisionId.description: Revision id the caller expects to publish, used for optimistic concurrency control.

content.description: Markdown chunk appended to a raw entry.

source.description: Immutable source metadata for this appended chunk.

contentType.description: MIME type of the appended chunk body (RFC 2046). Defaults to text/markdown.

originalBytes.description: Optional base64 original payload for this chunk, stored via content_assets.

PublicRawAppendInput.description: Append an immutable chunk to a raw entry.

id.description: Stable category identifier; use as categoryId when creating raw entries.

isDefault.description: Whether this category is applied when a raw create omits categoryId.

isRetired.description: Retired categories keep existing entries but accept no new ones.

systemKey.description: Stable built-in category key (e.g. 'conversation'), or null for an admin-managed category.

isSystem.description: Whether this category is built-in and protected from retirement/deletion.

entryCount.description: Number of raw entries currently filed under this category.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the category was created (ISO 8601).

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the category was last updated (ISO 8601).

isDefault.description: Apply as the default category for raw creates that omit categoryId.

against.description: Earlier version number to diff against.

diff.description: Unified diff between the two revision sources.

PublicRevisionDiffResponse.description: Structured diff between two page revisions.

status.description: Filter revisions by lifecycle state. Defaults to all.

limit.description: Maximum number of revisions to return per request (1-100). Defaults to 20.

cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned by a previous response.

items.description: Revision resources for the current result window.

nextCursor.description: Cursor for the next page of results, or null when there are no more.

pageId.description: Identifier of the page this revision belongs to.

version.description: Monotonically increasing revision version, starting at 1.

status.description: Revision lifecycle state: an unpublished draft or a published revision.

contentType.description: MIME type of the revision body (RFC 2046 type/subtype). Wiki/generated revisions are text/markdown; raw revisions carry the original source format.

contentHash.description: Content hash of the Markdown source, used for optimistic concurrency control.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the revision was created (ISO 8601).

publishedAt.description: Timestamp when the revision was published (ISO 8601), or null if still a draft.

canPublish.description: Whether the current caller is allowed to publish this revision.

actorKind.description: Whether this revision was written through a session (human) or an API key/pipeline (machine).

nature.description: Creation-time classification of the page: original human input or generated content.

contentSource.description: Markdown source of the revision. Present only on GET /pages/{id}/revisions/{version}; omitted from the revision list.

linkTargetPageId.description: Immutable link target recorded on link create/retarget revisions.

channel.description: Ingestion channel of a raw chunk.

url.description: Source URL of a raw chunk.

sessionId.description: Ingestion session identifier of a raw chunk.

command.description: Ingestion command of a raw chunk.

occurredAt.description: Timestamp when the raw chunk was captured (ISO 8601).

source.description: Immutable raw-source metadata of a raw create/append chunk.

id.description: Content-asset id of the immutable original bytes.

contentType.description: MIME type of the original bytes.

originalAsset.description: Dual-track raw storage reference to the immutable original bytes, or null when the body is already plain text.

categoryId.description: Raw taxonomy category of the owning page (echoed here for convenience). Null for non-raw pages.

frontmatter.description: Parsed YAML frontmatter from the leading --- block of the Markdown source, or null if absent/malformed.

date.description: Calendar date from supported frontmatter, or null when absent.

summary.description: Author-written summary from supported frontmatter, or null when absent.

metadata.description: Typed page metadata projection for this immutable revision.

pageId.description: Identifier of the page this revision belongs to.

version.description: Monotonically increasing revision version, starting at 1.

status.description: Revision lifecycle state: an unpublished draft or a published revision.

contentType.description: MIME type of the revision body (RFC 2046 type/subtype). Wiki/generated revisions are text/markdown; raw revisions carry the original source format.

contentHash.description: Content hash of the Markdown source, used for optimistic concurrency control.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the revision was created (ISO 8601).

publishedAt.description: Timestamp when the revision was published (ISO 8601), or null if still a draft.

canPublish.description: Whether the current caller is allowed to publish this revision.

actorKind.description: Whether this revision was written through a session (human) or an API key/pipeline (machine).

nature.description: Creation-time classification of the page: original human input or generated content.

origin.description: Provenance of this revision, projected when the caller may read it.

matchType.description: Which field produced the match for this result.

excerpt.description: Snippet of contentSource centered on the matched keyword (~excerptLength characters), or null for path/title matches or when not applicable. The result page never includes the full contentSource.

score.description: Relevance score in (0, 1]. Path matches score highest, then title, then content (weighted by how many times the term appears). Results are sorted by score descending within each returned page; null is not currently produced.

status.description: Lifecycle status of the search action.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the action was submitted (ISO 8601).

startedAt.description: Timestamp when processing started (ISO 8601), or null.

finishedAt.description: Timestamp when processing finished (ISO 8601), or null.

expiresAt.description: Timestamp when this action and its results expire (ISO 8601).

pollUrl.description: API URL to poll for status and results.

items.description: Result items; empty until status is succeeded.

code.description: Machine-readable error code, present when status is failed.

message.description: Human-readable error message, present when status is failed.

error.description: Error detail, present only when status is failed.

inputTokens.description: Embedding input tokens consumed by this search, when reported by the provider.

usage.description: Usage metadata, present only when status is succeeded.

PublicSemanticSearchAction.description: Semantic wiki search action resource, returned on submit and poll.

chunkId.description: Identifier of the matched knowledge chunk.

revisionId.description: Identifier of the page revision the chunk was extracted from.

contentHash.description: Content hash of the source revision, for grounding verification.

PublicSemanticSearchCitation.description: Grounded citation for a semantic search result item.

PublicSemanticSearchIdPathParams.description: Public semantic search action ID path parameters.

score.description: Cosine similarity score for the best-matching chunk on this page.

excerpt.description: Combined excerpt from the top matching chunks on this page (up to 1200 characters).

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-50). Defaults to 10.

pathPrefix.description: Directory prefix to restrict matching to pages under a subtree.

space.description: Restrict to one space the caller can read. Omit for the union of readable spaces (raw/generated only for Admins).

scope.description: Accepted for request-shape parity with the keyword endpoint; has no effect on semantic (vector) matching.

filterTag.description: Restrict results to pages whose frontmatter tags include any of these values.

filterStatus.description: Restrict results to pages whose frontmatter status matches any of these values.

filterOwner.description: Restrict results to pages whose frontmatter owner matches any of these values.

filterHasFrontmatter.description: Restrict results to pages with (true) or without (false) any parsed frontmatter.

results.description: Candidate similar pages sorted by score descending.

threshold.description: Threshold applied to the result set.

include.description: Optional additional report; "orphans" lists pages with zero inbound links.

space.description: Space slug to report stats for. Defaults to the default wiki space.

publishedPages.description: Published pages visible to the caller.

draftPages.description: Draft pages visible to the caller.

deletedPages.description: Soft-deleted pages visible to the caller.

createdInLast7Days.description: Pages created in the last 7 days.

updatedInLast7Days.description: Pages updated in the last 7 days.

orphans.description: Pages with no inbound links, when include=orphans is requested.

PublicTagMergeInput.description: Existing destination tag that receives all assignments from the source tag.

PublicTagMutation.description: Asynchronous tag rename, retirement, or merge operation.

PublicTagRenameInput.description: New name for a reusable tag.

email.description: Email address for the new account.

state.description: Replication lifecycle state of this backend.

totalItems.description: Total number of items to replicate.

completedItems.description: Number of items replicated so far.

failedItems.description: Number of items that failed to replicate.

lastError.description: Most recent error message, or null if none.

tempPassword.description: Temporary password issued to the user (8-128 characters).

SetMyPasswordInput.description: Set a new password for the current user (e.g. after a forced reset).

role.description: Role to assign to the target user.

status.description: Status to assign to the target user.

autoAssign.description: Automatically assign detected models to AI purposes.

actionId.description: AI action tracking the background model sync.

pollUrl.description: URL to poll for setup state while queued.

SetupAiBootstrapResult.description: OpenRouter AI bootstrap result. Never contains credentials.

email.description: Administrator email address for the initial account.

SetupInput.description: First-run setup input, creating the initial administrator account.

mode.description: Skip sample pages, or generate the example/help pages.

needed.description: Whether first-run onboarding still has incomplete steps.

ai.description: Per-purpose AI outcome; never contains credentials.

summary.description: Credential-free onboarding summary for the signed-in Admin.

SetupStateView.description: First-run onboarding state. Anonymous callers only receive whether account setup is needed.

mode.description: Writing mode selected for this wiki.

retainData.description: Whether to keep existing content on the backend instead of deleting it.

syncExisting.description: Whether to backfill existing content onto the backend.

type.description: Use the database as the storage backend.

config.description: Database backend has no additional configuration.

type.description: Use the local filesystem as the storage backend.

basePath.description: Base directory path for stored content.

type.description: Use S3-compatible object storage as the storage backend.

endpoint.description: Custom S3-compatible endpoint URL, if not using AWS.

prefix.description: Optional key prefix for stored objects.

config.description: S3 backend configuration. The secret access key is submitted separately via `secret`.

secret.description: S3 secret access key. Write-only; never echoed back.

StorageBackendUpsert.description: Storage backend configuration write. The shape of `config` depends on `type`.

purpose.description: Role this backend plays: authoritative content store, or Git export target.

isActive.description: Whether this backend is the currently active one for its purpose.

replicaState.description: Replication lifecycle state of this backend.

isReadPreferred.description: Whether reads are preferentially served from this backend.

syncStartedAt.description: Timestamp when the current sync started, or null if none is running.

syncCompletedAt.description: Timestamp when the last sync completed, or null if never completed.

lastSyncAt.description: Timestamp of the most recent successful sync, or null if never synced.

lastError.description: Most recent error message, or null if none.

hasSecret.description: Whether a secret (e.g. S3 key or Git token) is stored for this backend.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the backend was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the backend was last updated.

StorageBackendView.description: Storage backend view, as returned to the admin UI. Never includes secrets.

active.description: Backend currently active for reads and writes.

authoritative.description: Backend that is the authoritative content store.

preferredReadBackend.description: Backend preferentially used for reads, or null to use the authoritative backend.

gitExport.description: Git export backend, or null if not configured.

migration.description: In-progress or most recent migration, or null if none.

ssl.description: Whether SSL is enabled for the database connection.

containerPath.description: Local storage path inside the container.

hostPath.description: Local storage path on the host, or null when unknown.

deployment.description: Deployment information for the database and local storage backends.

backendId.description: Backend to prefer for reads, or null to use the authoritative backend.

runId.description: Transfer run that produced this artifact, or null if not run-generated.

originalFilename.description: Original uploaded filename, or null if unknown.

contentType.description: MIME type of the artifact content.

sizeBytes.description: Size of the artifact in bytes.

contentHash.description: Content hash, or null until the upload completes.

contentUrl.description: URL to fetch the artifact content, or null when not downloadable.

expiresAt.description: Timestamp when the artifact expires and becomes eligible for cleanup.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the artifact was created.

readyAt.description: Timestamp when the artifact became ready, or null if not yet ready.

deletedAt.description: Timestamp when the artifact was deleted, or null if not deleted.

TransferArtifactView.description: A transfer artifact (uploaded archive or generated report).

id.description: Identifier of the cleaned-up transfer run.

deletedPages.description: Number of imported pages that were deleted.

TransferCleanupResult.description: Result of deleting the pages a transfer run imported.

items.description: Transfer items for the current result window.

total.description: Total number of matching transfer items.

TransferItemList.description: Paginated list of content transfer item outcomes.

runId.description: Transfer run this item belongs to.

sourceKey.description: Key identifying this item in the source.

targetKey.description: Key identifying this item in the target, or null if not yet written.

bytesTotal.description: Total size in bytes, or null if unknown.

bytesProcessed.description: Number of bytes processed so far.

warningCode.description: Warning code, or null if none.

warningMessage.description: Warning message, or null if none.

errorCode.description: Error code, or null if none.

errorMessage.description: Error message, or null if none.

startedAt.description: Timestamp when processing started, or null if not yet started.

finishedAt.description: Timestamp when processing finished, or null if still in progress.

TransferItemView.description: Outcome of a single item processed within a transfer run.

id.description: Identifier of the queued transfer run.

status.description: The run has been queued for processing.

TransferRunAccepted.description: Response returned when a transfer run is accepted for asynchronous processing.

items.description: Transfer runs for the current result window.

total.description: Total number of matching transfer runs.

TransferRunList.description: Paginated list of content transfer runs.

actorUserId.description: User who started the run, or null if system-initiated.

sourceId.description: Transfer source this run reads from, or null if not source-based.

sourceArtifactId.description: Source archive artifact this run reads from, or null if not archive-based.

previewRunId.description: Preview run this run was confirmed from, or null if not a confirmation run.

options.description: Transfer options used for this run.

sourceFingerprint.description: Fingerprint identifying the source content snapshot, or null if not applicable.

totalItems.description: Total number of items to process.

processedItems.description: Number of items processed so far.

warningItems.description: Number of items completed with warnings.

currentItem.description: Key of the item currently being processed, or null if idle.

cancelRequested.description: Whether a cancellation has been requested for this run.

pauseRequested.description: Whether a pause has been requested for this run.

errorCode.description: Run-level error code, or null if none.

errorMessage.description: Run-level error message, or null if none.

errorDetail.description: Additional run-level error detail, or null if none.

reportArtifactId.description: Generated report artifact, or null if not yet available.

cleanedAt.description: Timestamp when the imported pages were cleaned up, or null if never.

queuedAt.description: Timestamp when the run was queued.

startedAt.description: Timestamp when the run started, or null if not yet started.

finishedAt.description: Timestamp when the run finished, or null if still in progress.

expiresAt.description: Timestamp when the run record expires.

canCancel.description: Whether the caller can currently cancel this run.

canRetry.description: Whether the caller can currently retry this run.

canPause.description: Whether the caller can currently pause this run.

canResume.description: Whether the caller can currently resume this run.

canCleanup.description: Whether the caller can currently delete the pages this run imported.

TransferSourceList.description: List of configured Wiki.js transfer sources.

baseUrl.description: Base URL of the source instance.

allowPrivateNetwork.description: Whether connecting to a private/internal network address is allowed.

hasCredentials.description: Whether an API token is stored for this source.

status.description: Current reachability status of the source.

lastCheckedAt.description: Timestamp of the last connectivity check, or null if never checked.

lastErrorCode.description: Error code from the last failed check, or null if none.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the source was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the source was last updated.

theme.description: Preferred theme, or null to reset to the default.

locale.description: Preferred locale, or null to reset to the default.

displayName.description: New display name, or null to clear it.

pendingMode.description: Target mode while a mode switch is in progress.

switchJobId.description: Background job handling the pending switch, or null.

WritingModeSettingsView.description: Writing mode settings available to administrators.

jobId.description: Queued LLM Wiki to Copilot migration job.

rawVisibility.description: Required when returning to Copilot; visibility for moved raw pages.

generatedVisibility.description: Required when returning to Copilot; visibility for moved generated pages.

id.description: Identifier of the writing-mode switch job.

WritingModeSwitchJobIdPathParams.description: Path parameters for a writing-mode switch job.

WritingModeSwitchJobView.description: Writing-mode switch job status and completed migration report.

get.description: Returns all registered analytics providers with their admin-only configuration and active script content.

put.description: Upserts one or more analytics provider configurations. Each provider is updated independently.

get.description: Lists all system themes (built-ins + custom) and the active selection. Requires manage_appearance.

post.description: Copies an existing theme (typically a built-in) into a new editable custom row. Requires manage_appearance.

get.description: Returns the public site identity and footer settings.

put.description: Updates the site name and footer fields. Requires the manage_appearance capability.

get.description: Returns the full system theme (id, name, css, isBuiltin). Requires manage_appearance.

put.description: Updates a custom theme's name and/or CSS. Built-ins are read-only. Requires manage_appearance.

delete.description: Deletes a custom theme. Built-ins cannot be deleted. If the deleted theme was active, the active pointer is cleared. Requires manage_appearance.

put.description: Sets the active system theme. Pass null to clear the active selection. Requires manage_appearance.

get.description: Returns the per-user reading-theme tokens (or defaults if the user has not customized). Authenticated.

put.description: Replaces the per-user reading-theme tokens. Authenticated.

delete.summary: Reset the caller's reading-theme tokens to defaults
delete.description: Deletes the per-user row; subsequent reads return the static defaults. Authenticated.

get.description: Serves the configured site icon, or redirects to the shipped default.

put.description: Uploads a custom site icon (SVG/PNG/ICO). Requires the manage_appearance capability.

delete.description: Reverts the site icon to the shipped default. Requires the manage_appearance capability.

schema.description: Directory prefix to scope the tree to a subtree (e.g. "docs" returns only the docs/ branch).

parameters.description: Directory prefix to scope the tree to a subtree (e.g. "docs" returns only the docs/ branch).

parameters.name: space

schema.description: Space slug to build the tree from. Defaults to the default wiki space.

parameters.name: filter[type]

schema.description: Filter to pages whose frontmatter type matches this value.

get.description: Returns the current user's API keys without secrets. Session-only; not callable with a Bearer key.

post.description: Creates a new API key with the requested scopes. Session-only; not callable with a Bearer key. The full secret is returned only once.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of API audit entries for the signed-in user.

delete.description: Revokes one of the user's API keys. Session-only; not callable with a Bearer key.

patch.description: Changes the signed-in user's email address.

post.description: Changes the signed-in user's password after verifying the current password.

patch.description: Updates the signed-in user's theme and/or locale preference.
Updates the signed-in user's display name.

get.description: Decrypts and returns the full secret for one of the user's API keys. Session-only; not callable with a Bearer key.

delete.description: Soft-deletes the specified user, hiding it from management and

post.description: Resets the password of the specified user and forces a reset on next login. Admin only.
Changes the role of the specified user. Admin only.
Enables or disables the specified user. Admin only.
